gestures.mdmPrompt: a tutor takes a step forward, smiles broadly, and gestures invitingly with both hands while introducing the topic
a person raises their right hand, extending five fingers outward while encouraging the learners to match the gesture
a tutor moves closer and uses both arms to emphasize the idea of five apples, gently pacing as they ask about the total
a person leans slightly forward, opens their arms wide while encouraging the class to count together the apples
a tutor points toward the counters enthusiastically, inviting the learners to come forward and participate in finding five plus five
a person steps to the side, moves their hands in a counting motion, and encourages learners to track each counter being combined
a tutor claps their hands together cheerfully, shifts weight from one foot to the other, and celebrates the total of five plus five
a person gestures thoughtfully toward the learners, inviting them to remember while nodding encouragingly about adding other numbers
